features.label: Built-in Password Manager
features.desc: Full AES-256-GCM encrypted vault with master password. Vault, Generator, Import/Export, Addresses tabs. Settings → Privacy → Password Manager.

features.label: Autofill — Username + Password
features.desc: Address bar mein key icon. Page load pe password form detect karo → auto-fill. Multiple accounts → selection banner. Works across all paths of same domain.
features.howto: Address bar mein key icon click karo ya page load pe automatic fill hoga.

features.label: Save Password Popup
features.desc: Login/signup ke baad credentials capture → editable popup (right side slide-in). Favicon, strength bar, eye toggle, Never/Not now/Save buttons.
features.howto: Kisi bhi site pe login karo — popup automatically aayega.

features.label: Address Manager + Autofill
features.desc: Full address book — Name, Email, Phone, Address, City, State, PIN/ZIP, Country, Company. Page pe address form detect → bottom-right banner → click to fill.

features.label: Import from Chrome / Firefox
features.desc: CSV export se passwords import karo. Separate passwords_imported.json mein store. Vault aur imported dono vault tab mein with source badge.
features.howto: Password Manager → Import/Export tab → Import CSV

features.label: Password Generator
features.desc: Length slider (8-64), uppercase/lowercase/numbers/symbols toggles, strength meter, copy button.

features.label: HTTP/HTTPS sites rendering fix
features.desc: Permission handler mein callback(false) default tha — ab callback(true). HTTP aur HTTPS dono properly render hoti hain.

features.label: Permission handler — no more blocking
features.desc: Sirf explicitly denied permissions block hoti hain. Timeout pe allow. Window not found pe bhi allow.

features.label: Autofill domain-only matching
features.desc: /signup pe save hua password /login pe bhi match karega. Path ignore, subdomain support.

features.label: Dual storage — vault + imported
features.desc: Manually saved: AES-256 encrypted. Imported: plain JSON. Autofill dono sources se kaam karta hai bina unlock ke.
